title: Run external app from monday
excerpt: Hi, is there a way to call external app to run based on a click or a status change, i don’t need any info exchange, just need it to run and jump to the front window

posts.author: Sam.WAWA1 (Sam Alfassy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, is there a way to call external app to run based on a click or a status change, i don’t need any info exchange, just need it to run and jump to the front window

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Sam.WAWA1 and welcome to the communtiy!

I hope you like it here

Do you need your app to be called (HTTP request to your endpoint) when someone clicks on a button or changes a status?

Or do you need to open a view? If so, where would that view be?

Looking forward to hearing from you

Cheers,
Matias
